title: BEM-860 mailbox scheduler
objective: Implement correct Curator-Claude-GPT mailbox protocol and one-minute mailbox polling. Required: 1) Create or update governance/audit/mailbox/from_claude/BEM859_PROTOCOL_ALIGNMENT_RESPONSE.md as expected response path placeholder with allowed statuses APPROVED, APPROVED_WITH_AMENDMENTS, BLOCKED_WITH_REASON. 2) Update governance/audit/mailbox/to_curator/BEM859_PROTOCOL_ALIGNMENT_REQUEST_FOR_CURATOR.md so route is GPT -> Curator -> Claude -> governance/audit/mailbox/from_claude/BEM859_PROTOCOL_ALIGNMENT_RESPONSE.md -> GPT reads mailbox; not Claude -> Curator -> GPT. 3) Create governance/runtime/mailbox_polling/BEM859_MAILBOX_POLLING.md describing one-minute polling of that mailbox path by GPT scheduler until final status appears. 4) If repository has existing scheduler/curator polling config, set BEM859 mailbox check interval to 1 minute without adding paid APIs and without writing issue #31. 5) Update governance/tasks/pending/BEM859_PROTOCOL_ALIGNMENT.md with status pending_mailbox_response. 6) Append short BEM-860 note to governance/AGENT_CONTEXT.md. No issue comments.
